Summary: Apple Developer team visible in Xcode
Description: Paid Apple Developer team appears in Xcode Accounts and can be selected in Signing and Capabilities.
In Xcode target Signing and Capabilities: team set to paid team, automatic signing enabled, no profile errors.

Summary: Create App Store Connect app record
Description: Create app in App Store Connect with bundle identifier com.genesisway.app.

Summary: Generate App Store Connect API key
Description: Create API key in App Store Connect for CI upload (key id, issuer id, private key).
Add APP_STORE_CONNECT_KEY_ID, APP_STORE_CONNECT_ISSUER_ID, APP_STORE_CONNECT_PRIVATE_KEY repository secrets.
Add APPLE_TEAM_ID and APP_IDENTIFIER repository variables.
Trigger workflow iOS TestFlight from GitHub Actions and verify build upload starts.
Confirm uploaded build appears in App Store Connect TestFlight tab.
Add internal testers and confirm install succeeds via TestFlight app.
Create external group and submit build for Beta App Review.
Track first wave of issues from testers and prioritize fixes.
Resolve top issues from beta feedback and publish follow-up build.
